{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032205005517E3A48BD203DE1B6F3E"}"},"total":7482},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7574366495402427161","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来看，以我看这么多年书里面这本描写的恋爱的过程和心理可以排上前三了，虽然是多女主，但是各有各的好，老许对瑶瑶的宠爱深入骨髓，对大小姐的调教后又互相的和解，对小沈老师的难舍难分与甜甜的恋爱感，无论是开始还是过程，以我目前来看描写都相当到位，作者真正的把渣渣许的心理展现给我们看。代入感是有的，而且很深，无论是瑶瑶的“一直都在”，还是小沈老师的“老公”，或者是大小姐的“哥哥”都很好的戳到了我心动的点，特别是大小姐的哥哥，不吹不黑我也心尖一颤啊，这谁顶得住啊目前一千四百六十四章，没有修罗场（不过还是很期待作者大大修罗场会怎么写），总的来说还是非常值得一看的书，特别推荐，不得不说也是学到了一些东西的，作者加油，希望继续能够看到更精彩的故事[书架加一][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][已种草][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][顶帖][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作][雀食神作]","text_exts":[{"e":245,"s":242,"text":"修罗场","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774126855DE1B6F3E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227574366495402427161%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227267739106057145406%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%BF%AE%E7%BD%97%E5%9C%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1763547632,"group_id":"7267739106057145406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"这个人很懒，除了美貌与智慧什么都没留下","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzZDnns1ocR178apava/st8=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"171937617947278","user_name":"大粽子好香"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"171937617947278","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_ra sten_duration":54794,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":195320,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":16823},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7388211066233094936","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"算是一本质量还可以的都市重生文了，跟陈汉升那些之类的虽然有些异曲同工，但是在人物刻画这边我觉得还是有看头，从客观角度来看，徐沐凝并没有做错什么，书中的人物也都没错的，前世只能说按主角没发家之前唯唯诺诺窝窝囊囊的的确是配不上徐，按徐的家庭条件来说，纯纯人上人，头汤给主角已经算很牛逼了哈哈哈哈哈哈，重生之后开始扭转人生，徐的心中对男主的固有观念也开始转变开始正视这个大变活人的主角。目前看了不到二百章吧，但是我还是希望徐能跟男主甜甜蜜蜜一点，别逼我求你！！！","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":10,"text":"都市重生","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774126855DE1B6F3E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227388211066233094936%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227267739106057145406%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%83%BD%E5%B8%82%E9%87%8D%E7%94%9F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720212305,"group_id":"7267739106057145406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3yj3Q4CPQLqNgi/5lm+9AMeZKq9gMMlNzoxky6D2Mut","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/26e7a14cf1534fb39dc6389bb37b5df4~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704732&x-signature=6%2BBiTv7VVIm7QS9XR7p%2FhuJSUUI%3D","user_id":"4146990374722515","user_name":"H"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4146990374722515","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info" en_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":11317,"reply_count":5,"show_pv":105117},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7516082100691370776","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感情戏写的真的很不错，女生的内心情感描写很细腻，有时候都怀疑作者是不是女的，很甜很甜 
三条主线:沈宣，陈钰瑶，许沐璇各有特色。沈宣算是智性恋吧，很懂主角的心思，相处很融洽；陈钰瑶是笨蛋美女的既视感，很乖很粘人；徐沐璇就是傲娇大小姐，易燃易爆炸，但是心系主角。
对于我这种喜欢感情戏的人来说，这本书真的很满足了我的所有要求，很不错。
PS:本书节奏比较慢，多女主，不喜欢的可能会觉得作者在水，创业占比30%左右。","text_exts":[{"e":116,"s":113,"text":"大小姐","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E5%A7%90&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774126855DE1B6F3E%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227516082100691370776%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227267739106057145406%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A7%E5%B0%8F%E5%A7%90%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1749979489,"group_id":"7267739106057145406","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0dIC6tEE5aDGVlwXR7gHKQR++vlXcjvtUdHV9HA6Hh8","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3732168443967102","user_name":"不会有地雷少女爱上我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3732168443967102","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7267739106057145406","book_info":{"abstract":"【老白风重生文，逻辑在线，人间清醒，年轻人奋斗与恋爱的教科书】
